task_goal: Extract natural-language relations explicitly supported by the text between already-provided entities, without mapping them to schema relation types yet.
global_constraints: Prefer using names from the provided entity list; if the text introduces an important missing entity for a supported relation, include it in new_entities.
If subject or object is not already in the entity list, the missing endpoint must be provided in new_entities with a short description.
Do not output schema relation types or ontology labels.
Only extract relations with explicit textual support; omit speculative relations.
If relation_phrase is too abstract, rewrite it into a wording closer to the text.
Output a JSON array only, with no commentary.
extraction_rules: Use a concise natural-language phrase for relation_phrase, such as "argues with", "works for", or "hides from".
Use one short sentence in description to summarize the relation.
Use the most direct supporting snippet or a faithful short paraphrase for evidence.
Favor recall first: if the text explicitly supports a relation, extract it now and let later grounding / dedup / dropping clean it up.
Treat relation_hints as guidance rather than a constraint; do not skip explicit relations just because the schema match is not obvious yet.
If the same entity pair has multiple semantically distinct and explicitly supported relations, you may output multiple items.
If priority entities are provided, prioritize ensuring they participate in at least one explicitly supported relation.
If a relation requires an important missing entity, include it in new_entities as [{"name": "...", "description": "..."}].
Do not emit duplicate relations with the same meaning for the same entity pair.

examples.subject: Alice
examples.description: Alice and Bob are in open verbal conflict.
examples.evidence: Alice shouted at Bob and accused him of lying.

examples.subject: Captain Reed
examples.description: Captain Reed directs and leads the patrol team.
examples.evidence: Captain Reed ordered the patrol team to move out.
